metadata.activation_timing: applies before triggering action damage is calculated; current simulator uses same_action_aggregate_approximation so the whole triggering action receives the buff

metadata.source_note: Halo of Starry Radiance 5-set grants party ATK% after healing team members. Off-Tune Buildup Rate defaults to 1.0 and can be increased by Mornye Syntony Field +50%; Energy Regen is not used.
